messages.content: 中译英：由于他是在“中医药大学”就读，所以相较于其他就读于西医院校的康复专业学生，会学习到更多的中医特色知识，如中药、中医基础理论、推拿学、针灸学等。同时他在该医院康复科实习期间，也学习到了该科室相较于其他科室、医院而特有的杵针治疗技术。

Because he is studying at "Traditional Chinese Medicine University," he is able to learn more about traditional Chinese medicine, such as Chinese herbal medicine, basic theories of traditional Chinese medicine, tuina (Chinese therapeutic massage), acupuncture, etc., compared to other rehabilitation students who study in western medicine colleges. At the same time, during his internship in the rehabilitation department of the hospital, he also learned the unique technique of using a moxibustion needle compared to other departments or hospitals.

润色如下内容：Because he is studying at “Traditional Chinese Medicine University,” he is able to learn more about traditional Chinese medicine, such as Chinese herbal medicine, basic theories of traditional Chinese medicine, tuina (Chinese therapeutic massage), acupuncture, etc., compared to other rehabilitation students who study in western medicine colleges. At the same time, during his internship in the rehabilitation department of the hospital, he also learned the unique technique of using a moxibustion needle compared to other departments or hospitals.

Due to his enrollment in "Traditional Chinese Medicine University," he has the opportunity to acquire greater knowledge in traditional Chinese medicine compared to rehabilitation students studying in Western medicine institutions. His curriculum covers various aspects including Chinese herbal medicine, fundamental theories of traditional Chinese medicine, tuina (Chinese therapeutic massage), acupuncture, and more. Additionally, during his internship in the rehabilitation department of the hospital, he has also gained insight into the unique technique of moxibustion needle therapy exclusive to this department and not commonly found in other healthcare facilities.
中译英：他在实习中还展现了不错的创造性思维。他能在带教老师只给出简单指令，如带领偏瘫患者进行偏瘫侧肢体综合训练时，根据带教老师和自己的评估和判断，构思出适合每个患者单独的主被动运动训练动作和套路。他能通过患者在接受推拿治疗时不同的部位的疼痛，使用不同的手法进行推拿，也会对患者疼痛处的肌肉进行一定的拉伸。

During his internship, he has also demonstrated impressive creativity. When given simple instructions by his supervising teacher, such as leading stroke patients in comprehensive training for their affected limbs, he is able to come up with individualized exercises and routines based on his own assessment and judgment, in addition to the guidance provided by his teacher. Moreover, he adapts his tuina (Chinese therapeutic massage) techniques based on the specific areas of pain experienced by patients, utilizing different manipulations for different parts of the body. He also incorporates muscle stretching to alleviate discomfort in the affected areas.

润色如下内容：During his internship, he has also demonstrated impressive creativity. When given simple instructions by his supervising teacher, such as leading stroke patients in comprehensive training for their affected limbs, he is able to come up with individualized exercises and routines based on his own assessment and judgment, in addition to the guidance provided by his teacher. Moreover, he adapts his tuina (Chinese therapeutic massage) techniques based on the specific areas of pain experienced by patients, utilizing different manipulations for different parts of the body. He also incorporates muscle stretching to alleviate discomfort in the affected areas.

Throughout his internship, he has showcased remarkable creativity. Despite receiving only basic instructions from his supervising teacher, such as guiding stroke patients in comprehensive training for their impaired limbs, he exhibits the ability to devise personalized exercises and routines tailored to each patient's needs, drawing on his own assessments and judgment, in addition to the guidance provided by his teacher. Furthermore, he demonstrates adaptability in his tuina (Chinese therapeutic massage) techniques, responding to the precise areas of pain experienced by patients by employing various manipulations specific to different regions of the body. Additionally, he incorporates targeted muscle stretching to alleviate discomfort in the affected areas.

中译英：他优秀的学术能力和知识运用于实践的能力给我留下了深刻的印象。他对通过运动疗法治疗康复患者各部位疼痛的各种动作熟悉，能够带领患者准确的完成各项动作，并及时纠正患者的错误姿态，如肌肉、肌腱的静态拉伸和动态拉伸。他还能够在短时间内熟练掌握科室内各种康复理疗器材的准确操作使用方法，并能将器材准确放置于患者接受治疗的部位。此外，他能立刻回答大部分带教老师在治疗师提出的康复相关类问题。他能够通过自己的视触问诊方法判断出临床常见的各种疾病病程分期和患者各项身体指标的分期。 他能熟练使用各类中医传统推拿手法和掌握现代运动康复手法，如Maitland关节松动术等。

His exceptional academic abilities and application of knowledge in practice have left a deep impression on me. He is well-versed in various movements used in rehabilitative exercise therapy for different pain areas in patients, and skillfully guides them to accurately perform each action while promptly correcting any incorrect postures, including static and dynamic stretching of muscles and tendons. Moreover, he quickly masters the precise operational methods for various rehabilitation therapy equipment within the department and ensures their accurate placement on patients for treatment. Additionally, he can promptly answer most of the rehabilitation-related questions posed by his supervising teachers during treatment sessions. Through his visual, tactile, and questioning examination methods, he can determine the staging of various common clinical diseases and the stage of specific physical indicators in patients. He is adept at utilizing various traditional Chinese tuina techniques and has mastery of modern sports rehabilitation techniques such as the Maitland mobilization technique.

润色如下内容：His exceptional academic abilities and application of knowledge in practice have left a deep impression on me. He is well-versed in various movements used in rehabilitative exercise therapy for different pain areas in patients, and skillfully guides them to accurately perform each action while promptly correcting any incorrect postures, including static and dynamic stretching of muscles and tendons. Moreover, he quickly masters the precise operational methods for various rehabilitation therapy equipment within the department and ensures their accurate placement on patients for treatment. Additionally, he can promptly answer most of the rehabilitation-related questions posed by his supervising teachers during treatment sessions. Through his visual, tactile, and questioning examination methods, he can determine the staging of various common clinical diseases and the stage of specific physical indicators in patients. He is adept at utilizing various traditional Chinese tuina techniques and has mastery of modern sports rehabilitation techniques such as the Maitland mobilization technique.

His outstanding academic abilities and practical knowledge have made a profound impression on me. He demonstrates a thorough understanding of the various movements used in rehabilitative exercise therapy for different areas of pain in patients, skillfully guiding them in precise execution while promptly correcting any incorrect postures. This includes both static and dynamic stretching techniques for muscles and tendons. Additionally, he swiftly acquires mastery of the specific operational methods for various rehabilitation therapy equipment within the department, ensuring their accurate utilization on patients for effective treatment. Moreover, he exhibits a prompt and comprehensive ability to address most rehabilitation-related inquiries raised by his supervising teachers during treatment sessions. Through his adept employment of visual, tactile, and questioning examination methods, he can accurately determine the staging of common clinical diseases and assess the progress of specific physical indicators in patients. Furthermore, he excels in utilizing a wide range of traditional Chinese tuina techniques and has attained expertise in modern sports rehabilitation techniques, such as the Maitland mobilization technique.
中译英：在我负责带教的小组，他主要负责的工作是对患者使用的各类物理因子疗法仪器的佩戴和调试，对患者实施身体各疼痛部位的中医传统推拿手法和杵针治疗，带动因神经损伤而导致肢体的患者进行患肢综合训练，引导患者通过正确的姿势、体态完成运动疗法各类动作。

In the group that I am responsible for supervising, his main tasks include the application and adjustment of various physical therapy devices used by patients. He also administers traditional Chinese tuina techniques and moxibustion needle therapy to treat pain in different areas of the body. Additionally, he assists patients with neurological injuries in comprehensive training for their affected limbs, guiding them to perform various exercises with correct posture and body alignment during exercise therapy.

润色如下内容：In the group that I am responsible for supervising, his main tasks include the application and adjustment of various physical therapy devices used by patients. He also administers traditional Chinese tuina techniques and moxibustion needle therapy to treat pain in different areas of the body. Additionally, he assists patients with neurological injuries in comprehensive training for their affected limbs, guiding them to perform various exercises with correct posture and body alignment during exercise therapy.

In the group that I am responsible for supervising, his primary responsibilities involve the application and calibration of various physical therapy devices used by patients. Furthermore, he adeptly utilizes traditional Chinese tuina techniques and moxibustion needle therapy to address pain in different areas of the body. Additionally, he plays a crucial role in assisting patients with neurological injuries in comprehensive training for their affected limbs, offering guidance and support as they perform a variety of exercises with proper posture and body alignment during exercise therapy.
中译英：我作为带教老师（治疗师），和他于2022年8月1日在成都中医药大学附属医院康复科认识，他被分配至我负责带教的小组。

I, as a supervising teacher (therapist), met him on August 1, 2022, at the Rehabilitation Department of Chengdu Traditional Chinese Medicine University Affiliated Hospital. He was assigned to the group that I am responsible for supervising.

润色如下内容：I, as a supervising teacher (therapist), met him on August 1, 2022, at the Rehabilitation Department of Chengdu Traditional Chinese Medicine University Affiliated Hospital. He was assigned to the group that I am responsible for supervising.

As a supervising teacher (therapist), I had the pleasure of meeting him on August 1, 2022, at the Rehabilitation Department of Chengdu Traditional Chinese Medicine University Affiliated Hospital. He was assigned to the group that I am personally responsible for supervising.

中译英：我在让他单独训练功能障碍者（如脑梗、脑出血者）进行主被动训练前，会带领他对患者的既往病史进行询问，确认患者的发病时间和进行各肢体的肌肉力量评级，确定患者的病程处于哪个时期（Brunnstrom分期），评价患者的意识、言语、吞咽等功能状态，在带领他进行以上大致评估后，指导他对患者应该进行被动活动训练或者主动运动训练还是抗阻训练，并带领他设计大概的训练计划，最后他再根据计划和自身所学，设计相应的动作，然后实施于患者。目前在我的带领下，他及其他组员已经帮助患者成功出院20余人次。

Before allowing him to independently train individuals with functional impairments (such as stroke or cerebral hemorrhage patients), I lead him in conducting a thorough inquiry into the patients' medical history. This includes confirming the onset of symptoms and assessing the muscle strength of each limb to determine the stage of the patients' condition (using the Brunnstrom staging system). We also evaluate their cognitive functions, speech, and swallowing abilities. After guiding him through these assessments, I provide instructions on whether the patient requires passive range of motion exercises, active movements, or resistance training. Together, we design a rough training plan, and he utilizes his knowledge to create appropriate exercises. He then implements these exercises with the patients. Under my guidance, he and other group members have successfully assisted over 20 patients in being discharged.

润色如下内容：Before allowing him to independently train individuals with functional impairments (such as stroke or cerebral hemorrhage patients), I lead him in conducting a thorough inquiry into the patients’ medical history. This includes confirming the onset of symptoms and assessing the muscle strength of each limb to determine the stage of the patients’ condition (using the Brunnstrom staging system). We also evaluate their cognitive functions, speech, and swallowing abilities. After guiding him through these assessments, I provide instructions on whether the patient requires passive range of motion exercises, active movements, or resistance training. Together, we design a rough training plan, and he utilizes his knowledge to create appropriate exercises. He then implements these exercises with the patients. Under my guidance, he and other group members have successfully assisted over 20 patients in being discharged.

Before allowing him to independently train individuals with functional impairments (such as stroke or cerebral hemorrhage patients), I guide him through a comprehensive assessment of the patients' medical history. This involves inquiring about the onset of symptoms and evaluating the strength of each limb to determine the stage of their condition using the Brunnstrom staging system. Additionally, we assess their cognitive functions, speech abilities, and swallowing capabilities. After conducting these assessments, I provide instructions on whether the patient requires passive range of motion exercises, active movements, or resistance training. Together, we develop a rough training plan, and he utilizes his knowledge to design suitable exercises. Subsequently, he implements these exercises with the patients. Under my guidance, he and other group members have successfully aided in the discharge of over 20 patients.
